suite.name: Pdv

kw.name: Suite Setup Default
Set Suite Variable
kw.doc: Makes a variable available everywhere within the scope of the current suite.

kw.name: Get Current Date
kw.doc: Returns current local or UTC time with an optional increment.

kw.name: Evaluate
kw.doc: Evaluates the given expression in Python and returns the result.

kw.name: Set Variable If
kw.doc: Sets variable based on the given condition.

kw.name: Log
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.name: Open App
Open App Session
Get Device UDID From Tag
Evaluate
kw.doc: Evaluates the given expression in Python and returns the result.

kw.name: Get Current Date
kw.doc: Returns current local or UTC time with an optional increment.

kw.name: Evaluate
kw.doc: Evaluates the given expression in Python and returns the result.

kw.name: Set Variable If
kw.msg: ${formatted} = [DEVICE_MAPPING] Tag mapeada para UDID | tag=rede | udid=7PR00A89M | timestamp=2026-06-18 21:36:27
kw.doc: Sets variable based on the given condition.

kw.name: Log
kw.msg: [DEVICE_MAPPING] Tag mapeada para UDID | tag=rede | udid=7PR00A89M | timestamp=2026-06-18 21:36:27
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.
Retorna o UDID do dispositivo a ser usado na sessão Appium.

kw.name: Set Variable
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.name: Set Suite Variable
kw.doc: Makes a variable available everywhere within the scope of the current suite.

kw.name: Get Current Date
kw.doc: Returns current local or UTC time with an optional increment.

kw.name: Evaluate
kw.doc: Evaluates the given expression in Python and returns the result.

kw.name: Set Variable If
kw.msg: ${formatted} = [APP_CONNECT] Conectando ao dispositivo | udid=7PR00A89M | tag=rede | systemPort=8202 | appiumServer=http://192.168.0.10:4723/wd/hub | timestamp=2026-06-18 21:36:27
kw.doc: Sets variable based on the given condition.

kw.name: Log
kw.msg: [APP_CONNECT] Conectando ao dispositivo | udid=7PR00A89M | tag=rede | systemPort=8202 | appiumServer=http://192.168.0.10:4723/wd/hub | timestamp=2026-06-18 21:36:27
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.name: Open Application
kw.doc: Opens a new application to the given Appium server. Capabilities of appium server, Android and iOS, Please check https://appium.io/docs/en/2.19/guides/caps/ | *Option* | *Man.* | *Description* | | remote_url | Yes | Appium server url | | alias | No | alias |

Abre a sessão Appium no dispositivo resolvido. Conecta ao device sem lançar nem resetar o app — o app deve estar aberto em foreground. Configurações de system_port e appium_server são lidas do devices.yaml via DevicesConfig.py.

kw.name: Clear Logcat
kw.doc: Clears the Android logcat buffer for the current device.

kw.name: Get Current Date
kw.doc: Returns current local or UTC time with an optional increment.

kw.name: Evaluate
kw.doc: Evaluates the given expression in Python and returns the result.

kw.name: Set Variable If
kw.msg: ${formatted} = [APP_OPEN] Aplicação aberta com sucesso | tag=rede | timestamp=2026-06-18 21:36:35
kw.doc: Sets variable based on the given condition.

kw.name: Log
kw.msg: [APP_OPEN] Aplicação aberta com sucesso | tag=rede | timestamp=2026-06-18 21:36:35
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.name: Fail
kw.doc: Fails the test with the given message and optionally alters its tags.
Keyword de Test Setup — abre a aplicação e limpa o logcat. Use via base_<modulo>.resource no Suite Setup ou Test Setup.
Setup padrão de suite — abre a aplicação e prepara o ambiente. Use quando não há necessidade de setup específico por módulo.

test.name: PDV - List Orders Functions

kw.name: Test Setup Default
Get Variable Value
kw.doc: Returns variable value or ``default`` if the variable does not exist.

kw.name: Skip
kw.arg: Teste ignorado: falha de UI detectada no teste anterior — o app pode estar em estado inválido.
kw.doc: Skips the rest of the current test.

kw.name: Get Current Date
kw.doc: Returns current local or UTC time with an optional increment.

kw.name: Evaluate
kw.doc: Evaluates the given expression in Python and returns the result.

kw.name: Set Variable If
kw.msg: ${formatted} = [TEST_START] Iniciando teste | test=PDV - List Orders Functions | timestamp=2026-06-18 21:36:35
kw.doc: Sets variable based on the given condition.

kw.name: Log
kw.msg: [TEST_START] Iniciando teste | test=PDV - List Orders Functions | timestamp=2026-06-18 21:36:35
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

Setup padrão de teste — registra início do caso de teste no log. Ignora o teste automaticamente se uma falha de UI foi detectada no teste anterior, evitando falhas em cadeia por estado inválido da interface.

kw.name: PDV - Complete Flow - List Orders Functions
Pdv - Home - Verify Visible
Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element specified by the ``locator`` is visible.
Card "Novo Pedido" — destaque na home.

kw.name: Pdv - Home - Click List Orders
Wait Visible And Click Element
Run With Screenshot On Failure
Run Keyword
Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element specified by the ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Clicks the element identified by ``locator``.
Executes the given keyword with the given arguments.

kw.name: Capture Page Screenshot
kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the current page and embeds it into the log.

kw.name: Fail
kw.doc: Fails the test with the given message and optionally alters its tags.

Executa uma keyword e, em caso de falha, captura screenshot e relança o erro. Centraliza o padrão TRY/EXCEPT do projeto — todas as keywords públicas deste arquivo delegam sua lógica real a uma keyword _Do via este wrapper.
Aguarda o elemento ficar visível e clica nele. Aceita timeout customizável — substitui Wait And Click Element.
Card "Lista de Pedidos".

kw.name: Orders List - Should Be Visible
Wait Until Element Is Visible
Capture Page Screenshot
kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the current page and embeds it into the log.

kw.doc: Waits until the element specified by the ``locator`` is visible.

kw.doc: Verifica que a tela de Lista de Pedidos está visível.

kw.name: Pdv - Navigate To View Order
kw.doc: Clica no primeiro pedido, visualiza, verifica a tela e volta para a lista.

kw.name: Pdv - Navigate To Reprint First Order Receipt
kw.doc: Clica no primeiro pedido, reimprimi o comprovante e verifica o status de impressão.

kw.name: Pdv - Navigate To Fiscal Details First Order
kw.doc: Clica no primeiro pedido, abre Detalhes da Nota Fiscal, verifica e volta para a lista.

kw.name: Pdv - Navigate To Cancel First Order
kw.doc: Clica no primeiro pedido, cancela, confirma e fecha o modal de sucesso.

kw.name: Pdv - Navigate To Print Receipts
kw.doc: Abre o modal de impressão, seleciona Recebimentos e verifica o ciclo de status.

kw.name: Pdv - Navigate To Print Sales Summary
kw.doc: Abre o modal de impressão, seleciona Resumo de Vendas e verifica o ciclo de status.

kw.name: Orders List - Click Back
kw.doc: Clica no botão Voltar da top bar.

kw.name: Pdv - Home - Verify Visible
kw.doc: Card "Novo Pedido" — destaque na home.
Navega pela Lista de Pedidos: visualiza, reimprimi, acessa nota fiscal, cancela pedido e imprime relatórios.
kw.status: WebDriverException: Message: An unknown server-side error occurred while processing the command. Original error: java.lang.ClassCastException: java.util.ArrayList$ListItr cannot be cast to org.eclipse.wst.xml.xpath2.processor.internal.types.NodeType Stacktrace: io.appium.uiautomator2.common.exceptions.UiAutomator2Exception: java.lang.ClassCastException: java.util.ArrayList$ListItr cannot be cast to org.eclipse.wst.xml.xpath2.processor.internal.types.NodeType at io.appium.uiautomator2.core.AccessibilityNodeInfoDumper.findNodes(AccessibilityNodeInfoDumper.java:257) at io.appium.uiautomator2.utils.ElementLocationHelpers.getXPathNodeMatch(ElementLocationHelpers.java:119) at io.appium.uiautomator2.handler.FindElements.findElements(FindElements.java:112) at io.appium.uiautomator2.handler.FindElements.safeHandle(FindElements.java:75) at io.appium.uiautomator2.handler.request.SafeRequestHandler.handle(SafeRequestHandler.java:59) at io.appium.uiautomator2.server.AppiumServlet.handleRequest(AppiumServlet.java:266) [ Message content over the limit has been removed. ] ...t.xml.xpath2.processor.DefaultEvaluator.do_step(DefaultEvaluator.java:1111) at org.eclipse.wst.xml.xpath2.processor.DefaultEvaluator.visit(DefaultEvaluator.java:1249) at org.eclipse.wst.xml.xpath2.processor.DefaultEvaluator.visit(DefaultEvaluator.java:154) at org.eclipse.wst.xml.xpath2.processor.internal.ast.XPathExpr.accept(XPathExpr.java:43) at org.eclipse.wst.xml.xpath2.processor.DefaultEvaluator.do_expr(DefaultEvaluator.java:337) at org.eclipse.wst.xml.xpath2.processor.DefaultEvaluator.visit(DefaultEvaluator.java:366) at org.eclipse.wst.xml.xpath2.processor.DefaultEvaluator.visit(DefaultEvaluator.java:154) at org.eclipse.wst.xml.xpath2.processor.ast.XPath.accept(XPath.java:60) at org.eclipse.wst.xml.xpath2.processor.DefaultEvaluator.evaluate2(DefaultEvaluator.java:325) at org.eclipse.wst.xml.xpath2.processor.ast.XPath.evaluate(XPath.java:133) at io.appium.uiautomator2.core.AccessibilityNodeInfoDumper.findNodes(AccessibilityNodeInfoDumper.java:223) ... 37 more

kw.name: Test Teardown Default
Run Keyword If Test Failed
Capture Failure Screenshot
Capture Page Screenshot
kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the current page and embeds it into the log.

kw.name: Get Current Date
kw.doc: Returns current local or UTC time with an optional increment.

kw.name: Evaluate
kw.doc: Evaluates the given expression in Python and returns the result.

kw.name: Set Variable If
kw.msg: ${formatted} = [SCREENSHOT_CAPTURED] Screenshot capturado | file=FAIL_PDV - List Orders Functions.png | timestamp=2026-06-18 21:36:40
kw.doc: Sets variable based on the given condition.

kw.name: Log
kw.msg: [SCREENSHOT_CAPTURED] Screenshot capturado | file=FAIL_PDV - List Orders Functions.png | timestamp=2026-06-18 21:36:40
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.
Captura screenshot nomeado com o nome do teste atual. Chamado automaticamente pelo Test Teardown Default em caso de falha.
Runs the given keyword with the given arguments, if the test failed.

kw.name: Set Suite Variable
kw.doc: Makes a variable available everywhere within the scope of the current suite.

kw.name: Get Current Date
kw.doc: Returns current local or UTC time with an optional increment.

kw.name: Evaluate
kw.doc: Evaluates the given expression in Python and returns the result.

kw.name: Set Variable If
kw.msg: ${formatted} = [TEST_END] Teste finalizado | test=PDV - List Orders Functions | status=FAIL | timestamp=2026-06-18 21:36:40
kw.doc: Sets variable based on the given condition.

kw.name: Log
kw.msg: [TEST_END] Teste finalizado | test=PDV - List Orders Functions | status=FAIL | timestamp=2026-06-18 21:36:40
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

Teardown padrão de teste — captura screenshot em caso de falha. Em caso de falha, ativa o flag de suite para que testes subsequentes sejam ignorados (SKIP), evitando falhas em cadeia por estado inválido do app.

test.doc: Navega pela Lista de Pedidos: visualiza, reimprimi, acessa nota fiscal, cancela pedido e imprime relatórios.
test.status: WebDriverException: Message: An unknown server-side error occurred while processing the command. Original error: java.lang.ClassCastException: java.util.ArrayList$ListItr cannot be cast to org.eclipse.wst.xml.xpath2.processor.internal.types.NodeType Stacktrace: io.appium.uiautomator2.common.exceptions.UiAutomator2Exception: java.lang.ClassCastException: java.util.ArrayList$ListItr cannot be cast to org.eclipse.wst.xml.xpath2.processor.internal.types.NodeType at io.appium.uiautomator2.core.AccessibilityNodeInfoDumper.findNodes(AccessibilityNodeInfoDumper.java:257) at io.appium.uiautomator2.utils.ElementLocationHelpers.getXPathNodeMatch(ElementLocationHelpers.java:119) at io.appium.uiautomator2.handler.FindElements.findElements(FindElements.java:112) at io.appium.uiautomator2.handler.FindElements.safeHandle(FindElements.java:75) at io.appium.uiautomator2.handler.request.SafeRequestHandler.handle(SafeRequestHandler.java:59) at io.appium.uiautomator2.server.AppiumServlet.handleRequest(AppiumServlet.java:266) [ Message content over the limit has been removed. ] ...t.xml.xpath2.processor.DefaultEvaluator.do_step(DefaultEvaluator.java:1111) at org.eclipse.wst.xml.xpath2.processor.DefaultEvaluator.visit(DefaultEvaluator.java:1249) at org.eclipse.wst.xml.xpath2.processor.DefaultEvaluator.visit(DefaultEvaluator.java:154) at org.eclipse.wst.xml.xpath2.processor.internal.ast.XPathExpr.accept(XPathExpr.java:43) at org.eclipse.wst.xml.xpath2.processor.DefaultEvaluator.do_expr(DefaultEvaluator.java:337) at org.eclipse.wst.xml.xpath2.processor.DefaultEvaluator.visit(DefaultEvaluator.java:366) at org.eclipse.wst.xml.xpath2.processor.DefaultEvaluator.visit(DefaultEvaluator.java:154) at org.eclipse.wst.xml.xpath2.processor.ast.XPath.accept(XPath.java:60) at org.eclipse.wst.xml.xpath2.processor.DefaultEvaluator.evaluate2(DefaultEvaluator.java:325) at org.eclipse.wst.xml.xpath2.processor.ast.XPath.evaluate(XPath.java:133) at io.appium.uiautomator2.core.AccessibilityNodeInfoDumper.findNodes(AccessibilityNodeInfoDumper.java:223) ... 37 more

kw.name: Suite Teardown Default
Get Current Date
kw.doc: Returns current local or UTC time with an optional increment.

kw.name: Evaluate
kw.doc: Evaluates the given expression in Python and returns the result.

kw.name: Set Variable If
kw.doc: Sets variable based on the given condition.

kw.name: Log
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.name: Close App
Close Application
kw.doc: Closes the current application and the webdriver session.

kw.name: Get Current Date
kw.doc: Returns current local or UTC time with an optional increment.

kw.name: Evaluate
kw.doc: Evaluates the given expression in Python and returns the result.

kw.name: Set Variable If
kw.doc: Sets variable based on the given condition.

kw.name: Log
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.
Keyword de Test/Suite Teardown — encerra a sessão Appium com segurança.
Teardown padrão de suite — encerra a sessão Appium com segurança.

suite.doc:
Suite de regressão — módulo Pdv (Smart PDV)
Cobre os fluxos principais do PDV. Pré-condição: app iniciado na tela inicial do Smart PDV.

errors.msg: [SCREENSHOT_CAPTURED] Screenshot capturado | file=FAIL_PDV - List Orders Functions.png | timestamp=2026-06-18 21:36:40
